title: Amtech R0126 280mm (11") Pro Wallpaper Scissors
features: DURABLE: These 280mm (11") pro wallpaper scissors have sharp, precision ground stainless steel blades for durability
VERSATILE: With two-tone comfort grip handles, they are ideal for cutting wallpaper and other decorating, household and kitchen applications
DECORATOR’S CHOICE: Perfect for wallpapering and precise trimming tasks
DURABLE DESIGN: Built to withstand regular use in demanding environments
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes
